Package com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXLibraryComponentMaintenanceModifierPlugin<O extends IXLibraryObject>
    Any component maintenance modifier plugin should implement this interface and library component maintenence routine will call the plugin to get all the modifiers which needs to be applied during Apply in component maintenance.
    IXLibraryCopyComponentModifierPlugin<O extends IXLibraryObject>
    Any copy component modifier plugin should implement this interface and library copy component routine will call the plugin to get all the modifiers which needs to be applied during copy process.
    IXLibraryExport
    Don't implement this interface instead implement IXLibraryXMLExport (for export from a file) or IXLibraryObjectsExport ( for export from xObjects)
    IXLibraryExportFilter<O extends IXFilter>
    Any library export filter plugin should implement this interface and library export will call the plugin to get all the filters which needs to be applied during an export process.
    IXLibraryExportOptions
    This interface returns the options of Library Export
    IXLibraryImport
    Do not implement this interface instead implement IXLibraryXMLImport or IXLibraryObjectsImport (not supported currently)
    IXLibraryImportExportErrorReporter
    The APIs of this interface helps to log messages during library import or export implemented via plugins during custom import or export if there is any error the error method can be called with appropriate message
    IXLibraryImportFilter<O extends IXFilter>
    Any library import filter plugin should implement this interface and library import will call the plugin to get all the filters which needs to be applied during an import process.
    IXLibraryImportModifierPlugin<O extends IXLibraryObject>
    Any library import modifier plugin should implement this interface and library import routine will call the plugin to get all the modifiers which needs to be applied during import process.
    IXLibraryModificationHistoryProvider<O extends IXLibraryObject>
    All custom modification history note provider will implement this interface.
    IXLibraryObjectsExport
    If you need to implement a custom export file processing then you need to implement this interface Implementation of this interface is needed if we want to support export of library parts in a format not supported within Library.
    IXLibraryTabNotifier  
    IXLibraryTabPage
    All the external tab page should extend from JPanel and implement this interface
    IXLibraryTabPanel
    All the external tab panel should extend from JPanel and implement this interface
    IXLibraryTabPanelProvider
    This will be called by Library to find out the applicable tab pages for groups (getTabPages()) and tab panels for group and tab name (getTabPanels() There could be multiple implementation of this interface and all of them will be called to get the external tab pages and panels
    IXLibraryUIOperations  
    IXLibraryValidator
    any custom validation should implement this interface Library UI update and import will call this interface validate method automatically
    IXLibraryXMLExport
    If you need to implement a custom export file processing then you need to implement this interface Implementation of this interface is needed if we want to support export of library parts in a format not supported within Library.
    IXLibraryXMLImport
    If you need to implement a custom import file processing then you need to implement this interface Implement this interface if we want to support import of files with different extensions not supported within Library.
    IXValidationReporter  
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryGroupName  
    IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryTabName  
    IXLibraryValidator.Context
    This enumeration states validation is running in which mode Import - Library Import and Edit is component edit
    IXValidationReporter.Severity
